Name: Backstab
Effect: Deal weapon damage + x to the target. Damage is increased when attacking from behind. Increase momentum. Weaken target when attacking from behind

Name: Black Mist
Effect: Dissolve into black mist making your untargetable for x Seconds. All target in the mist are attacked by your main hand attack once and afterwards every second for every momentum you have consuming the stacks. Allies in the mist cant be targeted by emey units

Name: Blessing of end
Effect: All allies gain increased damage against units affected by at least one condition

Name: Bloodletting
Effect: For x seconds you take 20% increased damage but for every point of damage you take you gain x% mana

Name: Curse of blood
Effect: Target unit takes damage over time (also allies) and get weakened every x seconds but they gain momentum every x seconds for x seconds and deal +x% damage

Name: Curse of pain
Effect: Target enemy takes damage over time

Name: Curse of the dead
Effect: Place a curse on the target enemy , if it dies within its duration it will explode dealing aoe damage and then come back to fight alongside the caster for a short period of time

Name: Curse of vulnerability
Effect: Curse the target so that its magical resistance is lowered. High threat.

Name: Desecrate
Effect: Create desecrated ground abvove your feet, dealing damage to all units (including allies), and increase allies and minions attack speed while weakening enemy units

Name: Deteriorate
Effect: Target unit has its physical and magical mitigation reduced for x seconds. Consumes Momentum for longer duration

Name: Drain Essence
Effect: Channel to drain mana and life from target enemy and restore your respective pools, or give some of your mana and health to an ally player

Name: Ends Grip
Effect: Grip a unit with dark magic into the air, making it unable to take action (stun) and dealing damage per second. Use momentum to increase duration.

Name: Finish
Effect: Deal X amount of damage as physical and magical damage (50:50%) . Use momentum to increase damage.

Name: Leeching Attacks
Effect: For the next 10 seconds your auto attacks replenish health equal to the damage you deal

Name: Leeching Strike
Effect: Deal x physical damage to the target. For each weakened stack the target has heal for x% of max health.

Name: Necrotic Strike
Effect: Strike target enemy for weapon damage + X and decrease the healing in receives by 10%, stacks up to 5 times. Increases momentum

Name: Plague ward
Effect: summon a static plague ward that attacks nearby enemies and applies a curse of the plague for 5 seconds. If the unit dies within these 5 seconds a new plague ward is spawned.

Name: Raise Dead
Effect: Channel dark magic raising one fallen enemy every 1 second for X seconds (depending on momentum) fighting for you for a short amount of time

Name: Reapers Scythe
Effect: Tries to execute an enemy unit below 25% health. 10% chance to instantly kill, increased by momentum. If enemy unit dies, reset cooldown, otherwise deal some damage and trigger cooldown

Name: Sacrifice
Effect: Sacrifice target allied unit making it explode to deal damage around it and gaining mana and healt equal to % percent of its current life and mana.

Name: Shade of Fear
Effect: Leave your body behind stunned and jump into the shadow realm. You become invisible and gain increased movement speed. When you tap the ability again you gain the position of the shade fearing all nearby enemies

Name: Shade of Horror
Effect: Leave your body behind stunned and jump into the shadow realm. You become invisible and gain increased movement speed. When you tap the ability again you induce a horrifying dream in target sleeping it for X seconds. Must be near your main target. Any damage awakes the target

Name: Shadow Step
Effect: Step towards target direction attacking all enemies in your path with all melee weapons dealing magical and physical damage (50:50%). Consumes momentum.

Name: Soul Harvester
Effect: For the next 15 seconds when an enemy unit dies within x yards around you gain health and mana.

Name: Turn
Effect: Target unit is turned into a allied minion for a short period of time and force it to attack nearby enemy units. Longer duration if weakened

Name: Rampant strike
Effect: Deals physical damage to the target unit. Increases momentum. Deals more damage per weakened stack.

Name: Arcane Ball
Effect: Conjure a slow moving ball of pure energy that moves in the target direction and deals X damage per 0,5 seconds to all enemy units in its path

Name: Arcane Barrage
Effect: Shoot lots of arcane missiles at the target enemy. Additionaly hits all weakened targets around the target. can be chanelled while moving

Name: Arcane Blast
Effect: Deal X magic damage around you, weakens the targets

Name: Arcane Bolt
Effect: Shoot an arcane projectile at the target enemy. Weakens the target

Name: Arcane Bomb
Effect: Place a orb of arcane energy at your location, that explodes after a 2 second delay, dealing high magical damage to all units in its range (also ally units) and disorient them afterwards if they are weakened

Name: Arcane Circle
Effect: Create a barrier arround the caster that cannot be passed by enemy units and increases magic damage and cast speed for ally units inside

Name: Arcane Echo
Effect: Repeat the last spell cast at 50% effectiveness.

Name: Arcane Lightning
Effect: Conure a chain lightning that damages the main target and blinds it, the jumps to 2 near enemie units. If enemies are weakend disarm them

Name: Arcane Splinters
Effect: Conjure an arcane splinter every 2 seconds for 20 seconds that flies towards your current target every time you auto attack them or cast a spell. Deals low damage and sticks to them. If it reaches 5 stacks they explode dealing aoe damage around the target and immobilize them. If they are weakened stun them instead

Name: Arcane Storm
Effect: Conjure an arcane storm around you silencing all enemies and slowing their movement speed.

Name: Arcane Strike
Effect: Conjure an arcane cloud above targets head that sends out a flash every 3 seconds that damages it and immobilizes it for a shot period of time

Name: Blessing of Delusion
Effect: All allies gain increased magical damage and mana regeneration

Name: Blink
Effect: Teleport to target location. Press again within 3 Seconds to blink back to previous location. Breaks CC

Name: Disorient
Effect: Disorient he enemy unit making wander around helplessly for x seconds. Direct damage awakens the target

Name: Counter Spell
Effect: Interrupt target spellcasting . High threat

Name: Dimensional shift
Effect: shift target unit into a different dimension for x seconds. For ist duration the unit wont take any damage but 50% of the damage that would have been taken will be suffered at the end of the duration. The unit can move with 30% reduced movement speed, can cast spells, but cannot attack.

Name: Distort Reality
Effect: Select two units and instantly swap their positions. Valid targets include ally, enemy and self combinations.

Name: Gravity Well
Effect: Create a singularity at the target location. Pull enemies toward its center and slow enemies inside.

Name: Magic Shield
Effect: Conjure a bubble at target area that absorbs X magic damage

Name: Mana Storm
Effect: Create Storm around you that damages (magic) you every seconds but regenerates equal amount of mana. Channeled ability.

Name: Master Magus
Effect: for the next 15 seconds you can cast while moving and have increased cast speed.

Name: Mirror Duel
Effect: Create an illusion of the current target which attacks and taunts the target. Takes 100% increased damage and deals 50% damage

Name: Mirror Image
Effect: Create 2 Illusions of the target ally unit. They deal 33% of the target units damage and receive 200% damage. They perform the same actions as the target unit. Illsuion spell effects other than damage have no effect

Name: Purify
Effect: Cleanse one beneficial condition from target enemy. If one condition was cleansed, enemy gains weakend

Name: Replenish
Effect: Increase mana regeneration around the caster for X seconds to ally units

Name: Rewind time
Effect: set back target unit to health, mana and positional values from 4 seconds ago

Name: Temporal Shift
Effect: Target enemies movement speed and cast speed is greatly reduced while your values increase by the same amount

Name: Temporal Wave
Effect: Immobilizes all units around the caster for x seconds, if the targets are weakened they are stunned instead

Name: Timesphere
Effect: Create a timesphere at target location where enemies have there movement speed reduced drastically, enemy projectiles are stopped and allies pass through with increased movement speed

Name: Aspect of the Beast
Effect: Increase your physical damage and movement speed but decrease your armor and mana regeneration

Name: Aspect of the Hunter
Effect: Increase your attack range with ranged weapons and increase your ranged attack damage by x%. Decreases you melee and magical damage by x%

Name: Aspect of the Owl
Effect: Increase your healing power and your mana regeneration, but decrease your magical and physical damage by x%

Name: Aspect of the Pack
Effect: Increase movement speed of allies around you for X and increase armor as long as they stay close to you.

Name: Aspect of the Tree
Effect: Gain + X% armor, + X amount health, decrease movement speed by 10% and attack speed by 10%. Increase your threat generation while standing still.

Name: Barbed Arrow
Effect: Ranged Shot that slows the target enemy. If it is allready weakened immobilize it instead.

Name: Binding Shot
Effect: Shot an immoblizing arrow at the target unit. All untis around it cannot move farther away than x meters from the bound unit.

Name: Bush
Effect: Create a Disguise at your current location. It works as a line of sight object. The caster can walk in and becomes untargetable for ranged attacks but can still be hit by melee attacks. When he remains inside for 4s he gains +X% critical strike chance.

Name: Camouflage
Effect: Become harder to detect (decrease aggro range significantly) for enemy units for x seconds. When you leave camouflage your next attack or spell is a guaranteed critical hit.

Name: Circle of Regrowth
Effect: place a circle on the ground where every ally player that walks in is healed by X every second.

Name: Cunning Blessing
Effect: All allies get increased heals and life regeneration

Name: Focused Kill Shot
Effect: Hold for up to 4 seconds for maximum damage. Deals physical ranged damage depending on the wind up time and 20% more damage if the unit has 25% health or less. If the enemy dies by this spell increase ranged attack speed for x seconds

Name: Grow
Effect: Heal target ally unit for x over x seconds (low) at the end of the duration heal it for additional x

Name: Healing Mushroom
Effect: Place a trap at your location. When an ally walks over it it heals for X over x seconds

Name: Healing Rain
Effect: Channel a healing rain that heals all allied units within ist radius with increasing rate the longer a unit remains

Name: Hibernation
Effect: Turn all allies around you into a hibernating cocoon for 4 seconds, preventing all physical damage and healing for x% of max health per second

Name: Hunter Salve
Effect: For X seconds you shot all ranged auto attacks at every marked unit in range

Name: Hunters Call
Effect: When activated all allies around you deal x% more damage + X% more if the targets are marked, stunned or immobilized.

Name: Hunters Run
Effect: become invisible and gain phased movement for a brief period of time and mark every unit u pass by. After u reaper shot every marked unit with ur ranged weapon instantly.

Name: Mark
Effect: Mark the target, it is weakened and takes increased physical damage

Name: Poisoned Weapons
Effect: For the next 30 secondes your ranged and melee attacks have a chance to apply poison

Name: Purifying Wisp
Effect: Send a wisp at target location which cleanses one poison effect every 3 seconds around it. Lasts X seconds. When it leaves heal all allies for X times amount of cleansed poisons

Name: Rapid Fire
Effect: Gain increased movement speed, increased ranged attack speed and the ability to shoot while running for X seconds

Name: Refresh
Effect: Place a 12 sec heal over time effect on the target via instant cast or hold for the whole effect over 3 second channel

Name: Reliable Shot
Effect: Shoot a target dealing X damage. Deals + X for evey poison stack currently on the target.

Name: Riposte
Effect: Becomes active after dodge or parry. Hit your main target instantly dealing weapon damage + X. +X% crit chance per momentum

Name: Retract
Effect: Jump back a litte shooting all enemnies in a cone in front of you slowing them. If they are weakened immobilze them instead.

Name: Ricochet Shot
Effect: Shoot a projectile that bounces from your main target to nearby enemies and poison them on hit

Name: Sleeping Dart
Effect: Fire a Dart with short range at target enemy that sleeps the target for x seconds. Any damage awakens the target. After it awakes it gains 1 stack of poison

Name: Sniping Shots
Effect: Increase your attack range for your ranged weapon and deal more damage the farther away you are from your targets

Name: Split Arrows
Effect: For the next x seconds your ranged auto attacks hit 2 other targets closest to your main target. Duration increased by momentum.

Name: Vine Field
Effect: Place a trap at the ground, the first enemy that passes through it triggers the trap revealing a big vine field that slows enemies and applies one stack of poison every X seconds while they remain in the area

Name: Wild Growth
Effect: All your current heal over time effects tick 100% faster

Name: Arcane Missile
Effect: Fire a single arcane missile at the target for x magic damage. Increase momentum

Name: Bash
Effect: Interrupt target spellcasting and deal a low amount of damage. High threat

Name: Heavy Strike
Effect: Increase the Damage of your next auto attack by x. increase momentum

Name: Lesser Heal
Effect: heal target ally for x health

Name: Lesser regrowth
Effect: heal target ally for x health over x seconds

Name: Quick Shot
Effect: 3 Charges. Shoot an instant shot at the target enemy with your ranged weapon. Increase momentum

Name: Quick Strike
Effect: Instantly attack the enemy for x melee physical damage. Increase momentum

Name: Taunt
Effect: Target unit is forced to attack you for 3 seconds

Name: Battle Shout
Effect: Increase allied units physical damage and decrease enemies physical damage around you. Also applies weakened. Effect gets stronger the more allies are in radius

Name: Berserk
Effect: Go into a frenzy, increasing attack speed by X% for X seconds. Costs X% current health to activate. Cannot change target or the effect is lost.

Name: Blessing of rage
Effect: All allies gain increased damage the more momentum they have

Name: Charge
Effect: Charges an enemy unit leaving behind a burning trail and stun the target for a brief period. Builds Momentum

Name: Cleave
Effect: Strike all enemies with mainhand damage + X in a cone in front of you. Build momentum when hitting more than 1 unit. At max momentum spend all momentum for +X % Damage

Name: Counter Attack
Effect: When an enemies dodges, blocks or parries an attack, this ability becomes active. Instant attack with your weapon and immobilize the enemy. Increased crit chance with higher momentum

Name: Earth Blast
Effect: Blast a cone shaped area in front of you with rocks dealing damage, silencing enemies for x seconds. At Max momentum Stun them instead. High Threat

Name: Elemental Orb
Effect: Conjure an elemental orb that surrounds you. As long as it surrounds you you immolate nearby enemies dealing damage per second. Whenever you fire a ranged attack or a targeted spell the orb also flies at the target and explodes for X damage around the target.

Name: Elemental Strike
Effect: Deal weapon damage as magical damage + X. Increase momentum

Name: Elemental blast
Effect: Blast all enemies in a cone in front of you for X Magic damage. High threat.

Name: Enrage
Effect: Becomes available after dealing or receiving a critical strike. Physical melee attacks deal X% increased damage for X seconds. You take 20% increased damage while Enraged.

Name: Find Weakness
Effect: Deal a small amount of damage and reduce the physical resistance of the target. High threat.

Name: Fire Blast
Effect: Blast a cone shaped area in front of you with fire, dealing damage, and burning enemies, dealing damage over time. High threat, At max momentum always crits

Name: Frost Blast
Effect: Blast a cone shaped area in front of you with frost dealing damage and slowing enemies and reduce their attack speed. At max momentum freezes enemies in place for x seconds.

Name: Imbue Air
Effect: Imbue weapon. Chance on hit to increase attack speed by x% for x seconds.

Name: Imbue Earth
Effect: Imbue your Shield with earth. Your blocks increase your physical and magical mitigation and have a chance to stun the attacker.Also increases your threat generation.

Name: Imbue Lightning
Effect: Imbue your weapon with lightning. Your attacks have a x% chance to trigger a chain lightning bouncing from your main target to 2 additional targets dealing x% spell damage

Name: Imbue Wind
Effect: Your auto attacks have a small chance to create momentum. Spells that create momentum have a 25% chance to create additional momentum

Name: Momentum Strike
Effect: Instant melee attack that deals weapon damage +x. Creates momentum. At max momentum consume momentum to guarantee a ciritcal hit and increase physical damage for x% for 10 seconds afterwards.

Name: Recklessness
Effect: For X seconds, your critical strike chance is increased by 50% and your auto attacks have a chance to create Momentum. Healing effects on you are reduced by 50%.

Name: Regenerating Stikes
Effect: For the next x seconds your melee or ranged attacks replenish X mana

Name: Relentless Strike
Effect: Strike that becomes avaiable after a critical strike. Instantly attack the enemy with your melee weapon, use momentum for increased damage. Allways is a critical hit.

Name: Shockwave
Effect: Jump into the air deal damage in a cone in front of you when landing and send out a shockwave which damages and weakens enemies in a line

Name: Spirit of Earth
Effect: Send a spirit at target ally. The unit and all allied units around it have their armor increased and have a chance to create momentum when hit. Stays with the target for 30 seconds then fades away

Name: Spirit of Flames
Effect: Send a spirit at target ally. Enemy units around the target are burned every 3 seconds. Stays with the target for 10 seconds then fades away.

Name: Spirit of Rage
Effect: Send a spirit at target ally. The ally and all units around it have their physical damage increased by x% and a chance to create additional momentum whenever they gain momentum. Stays with the target for 10 seconds then fades away

Name: Spirit of Rain
Effect: Send a spirit at target ally. The ally and all units around it are healed for a small amount and have increased mana regeneration. Stays with the target for 20 seconds then fades away.

Name: Spirit of Thunder
Effect: Send a spirit at target ally. The ally and all units around it have a there attack speed increased for x% and a chance to doublehot the target with auto attacks. Stays with the target for 10 seconds then fades away.

Name: Split Earth
Effect: Create a fissure of lava that damages all units every second (including allies) and applies buring when they leave the area.

Name: Tidal Wave
Effect: Send forth a wave of water dealing damage, knocking enemies back and cleanse burning of allied units

Name: Whirlwind
Effect: Attack all units around you with casters mainhand weapon. If you have momentum you can spend it to hold down the ability to continue spinning, draining mana and momentum every second and continue to attack enemies every second. Can trigger on hit effects. , max duration increased by momentum. Breaks slows and immobilze effects

Name: Barricades
Effect: Create a straight line barricade that enemies cannot pass. Enemies near the barricade take X damage every second.

Name: Bind
Effect: Binds 2 units together, either friendly or enemy units. Whatever damage or heal one unit receives, the other unit receives aswell. Breaks if units split too far.

Name: Blast of light
Effect: heal all allies around you for x

Name: Blessing of Mercy
Effect: All allies gain increased armor and health.

Name: Chastise
Effect: Enemies take X Dmg when attacking you and have a 20% chance to get weakened. Lasts X seconds

Name: Circle of Mending
Effect: Place a circle on the ground. After 3 seconds build up it heals all ally units within the circle for x

Name: Cleanse
Effect: Remove one negative condition of the target allied unit. If a conduition was removed gain momentum

Name: Conjure Beast
Effect: Conjures a beast of light that attacks enemies. High damage, low health.

Name: Conjure Guardian
Effect: Conjure a guardian of light fighting for the caster. Draws aggro and taunts. High resistances and health. Low damage

Name: Conjure Cleric
Effect: Conjure a cleric of light that heals the lowest target of the party. Also casts an absorbing shield on the highest threat member of the party.

Name: Divine Intervention
Effect: Raise your shield and block all incoming damage for 3 seconds. Also prevents all damage from allies standing in a small cone behind the caster.

Name: Ground Slam
Effect: Hit the ground reducing enemy attack speed and dealing low damage and weaken them. High threat.

Name: Heal
Effect: Heal a target ally. Hold down ability, max 4 seconds. Heal becomes stronger the longer the cast goes but also costs more mana. Can be instant tapped for minimal heal

Name: Holy Ground
Effect: Consecrate the ground around you dealing little damage to enemies standing inside an increase their chance to miss. Enemies standing inside holy gorund for 4s gain weakened.

Name: Light Orb
Effect: send a small orb of light toward target ally healing it and jump to the next ally after 1 second.

Name: Mercys Angels
Effect: Summon an untargetable angel at every ally unit that heals it for X (depending on your healing power) every 3 seconds. Lasts for 12 seconds.

Name: Mercys Call
Effect: Call out all enemies around you forcing them to attack you adn apply weakened to them. Your physical resistance is increased for 3 seconds.

Name: Pull
Effect: Pulls the target unit (ally or enemy) towards your position. Enemies pulled are forced to attack you for 3 seconds, allies gain +X% movement speed for 3 seconds.

Name: Ray of Mercy
Effect: Send out a beam of light where you are facing healing allies and dealing damage to units it touches. (pierces units), Hold for duration, costs mana per second.

Name: Retaliate
Effect: Becomes active after block. Perform a swing around you hitting all enemies around you for melee damage. Gain +x% block chance for x seconds when you hit a weakened unit. High threat.

Name: Save
Effect: Target ally cannot move or take any action but wont take any damage for 3 seconds and is cleansed from all negative effects

Name: Shield Bash
Effect: Becomes active after you block and attack. Bash all enemies in a cone in front of you with your shield, deal damage, weaken them and push them back a little. Enemies hit are slowed for x seconds. High threat

Name: Shield of Mercy
Effect: Target ally gets a shield that absorbs X amount of damage.

Name: Spell Reflect
Effect: Raise your shield and reflect all incoming projectile based spells targeted at you or allies around your for up to seconds. You are slowed by x% during this time

Name: Strong Grip
Effect: Increase your block chance for 5 seconds by a substantial amount. Gain Momentum for every succesful block

Name: Tactical Master
Effect: Becomes active after you block an attack. Increase your physical mitigation by x%. Stacks up to 5 times.

Name: Well of light
Effect: Summon a well of light. Allied players can use it to create an orb of light that heals it for X (depending on your healing power). Shares Cooldown with healing potions of any kind
